title: Genomic DNA Extraction from Sea Cucumber Body-Wall Tissue
author: Jihoon Jo
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.gk8buzw

steps.title: Dissect the body-wall tissue (about 3~5...
steps.instruction: Dissect the body-wall tissue (about 3~5 g) and cut them in small pieces with a razor blade. Rinse the tissues with autoclaved sea-water for minimalize the bacterial contamination.

steps.title: Add tissues in mortar with liquid nitrogen and grinding tissue
steps.instruction: Add tissues in mortar with liquid nitrogen and grinding tissue.

steps.title: Transfer ground tissues in a 35ml...
steps.instruction: Transfer ground tissues in a 35ml centrifuge tube with 10ml of pre-heated CTAB lysis buffer, add Protease K in the mix and incubate it at 65℃ for 1hour with mixing by gentle inverting every 5-10 min. 01:00:00

steps.title: Add 10ml of Phenol solution and...
steps.instruction: Add 10ml of Phenol solution and incubate at 65℃ for 10min. 00:10:00

steps.title: Add 10ml of Chloroform and mix...
steps.instruction: Add 10ml of Chloroform and mix by gently inverting at RT for 5min. 00:05:00

steps.title: Transfer the supermatant aqueous phase in a new tube
steps.instruction: Transfer the supermatant aqueous phase in a new tube

steps.title: Add 10ml of Chloroform and mix...
steps.instruction: Add 10ml of Chloroform and mix by gently inverting at RT for 5min. 00:05:00

steps.title: Transfer the supermatant aqueous phase in...
steps.instruction: Transfer the supermatant aqueous phase in a new tube, add the same volume of Isopropanol and 1/3 volume of 7.5M ammonium acetate. 7.5M ammonium acetate can be added to 0.5 volume of supernatant.

steps.title: Gently mix the tube and incubate...
steps.instruction: Gently mix the tube and incubate the tube at -80℃ for overnight. 16:00:00

steps.title: Centrifuge at 12000xg for 10min at 4℃
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 12000xg for 10min at 4℃. 00:10:00 Do not touch the DNA pellet.

steps.title: Add 70% of ethanol for washing the DNA pellet
steps.instruction: Add 70% of ethanol for washing the DNA pellet.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 12000xg for 10min at 4℃
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 12000xg for 10min at 4℃. 00:10:00 Do not touch the DNA pellet.

steps.title: Discard the ethanol and air-dry the...
steps.instruction: Discard the ethanol and air-dry the pellet for 10-20min at RT. 00:20:00

steps.title: Add 1-2ml of TE buffer (10mM...
steps.instruction: Add 1-2ml of TE buffer (10mM Tris, 1mM EDTA) and dissolve the pellet. Heat the tube at 60℃ for completely dissolve the pellet.
